text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You let me take such good care of you last year. I
hope you'll let me do the same again this year.
choice_data_list:
I still feel like it's supposed to be the other way
around...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, really? Anyway, it's a day to celebrate, so
let's not dwell on it.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to change the subject, but could I tell you
my resolution for this year?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
This year, I want to spoil you like you've never
been spoiled before! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I know I shouldn't jump the gun or anything, but I
just can't wait any longer...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
So, um... could I start this new year by coddling
you?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Your wish is my command, so let me know what
you want!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like this is less of a resolution and more of a
New Year's gift...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What should I request?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, a home-cooked meal? You've got it!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
New Year's only rolls around once every twelve
months, so I was thinking I'd cook something
special for you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Let's get right to it!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
All done! Seven-herb ozoni, softened black
beans, and a Happy New Year hamburger
steak! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I hope you don't mind if I feed you the first bite...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Okay, open wide! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each dish is flavorful and rich in nutrients! Super
Creek seems to be enjoying the food too.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Really? You're not going to wish for anything?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Grrr, then we'll just have to see who breaks first.
I'm not going home until you wish for something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several hours later...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... It's about time you told me your wish...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You've been waiting for so long. Surely there's
something you want to wish for.
choice_data_list:
I want to lay my head on your lap and take a
nap...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Finally, a wish! Go right ahead!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm also feeling... rather... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We fall asleep on top of each other. The pleasant
warmth sends us both into a deep slumber.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you've got it! Getting praised right from
day one should help your personal growth all year
long!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Okay, here I go. You're such a good trainer! The
very best there is! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Huh, what was that light just now? It looked like
my hand was glowing for a second there...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Did something happen? Is this what they call a
supernatural phenomenon?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My mind is suddenly flooded with ideas. I feel like
I can teach Super Creek anything!
